title: deer-flow.bead.enrichment.complete v1
description: BeadEnricher finished analysing a bead. Useful for pipeline latency monitoring, enrichment throughput dashboards, and detecting beads that stall in enrichment.

bead_key_hash.description: First 12 chars of the bead cache key hash — used to correlate with cache hit/miss events

n_pages_found.description: Number of wiki/graph pages found as relevant to this bead

n_pushback_issues.description: Number of pushback issues raised (vague language, scope creep, unstated assumptions)
